notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Owen Caissie reaches on a throwing error by catcher Patrick Bailey. Owen Caissie to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Stowers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Stowers grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers. Agustín Ramírez out at 2nd. Kyle Stowers out at 1st.
